allow: PowerShell($env:PATH; Write-Host "---"; Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\USER\\AppData\\Roaming\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Test-Path "C:\\Users\\USER\\AppData\\Roaming\\nvm\\nvm.exe")

PowerShell($nodeDir = "C:\\Users\\USER\\AppData\\Local\\node-portable"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $nodeDir | Out-Null; $url = "https://nodejs.org/dist/v20.14.0/node-v20.14.0-win-x64.zip"; $zipPath = "$nodeDir\\node.zip"; Write-Host "Downloading Node.js v20.14.0 portable..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $zipPath -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Download complete. File size: $\(\(Get-Item $zipPath\).Length / 1MB\) MB")
PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node' })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\npm.cmd"; Test-Path "C:\\Users\\USER\\AppData\\Roaming\\nvm")
